en.summary: The Prophet Muhammad (SAWW) declared that Ali ibn Abi Talib is his brother, minister, and successor among his family, and the best person he leaves behind, who will repay his debts and fulfil his promises. This hadith, transmitted through a Sunni chain including the son of Imam Ahmad ibn Hanbal, was originally addressed to the Muslim community to establish Ali's preeminence and his unique responsibilities after the Prophet's passing.

key_terms.وزير: Wazir (minister/helper) -- one who bears responsibilities on behalf of another, here denoting Ali's role as the Prophet's chief aide
key_terms.خليفة: Khalifah (successor/deputy) -- one who takes the place of another, here denoting succession in the Prophet's family
key_terms.دين: Dayn (debt) -- financial and moral obligations left by the Prophet

en.seo_question: What did Prophet Muhammad say about Ali being his brother and successor?

ur.summary: نبی کریم صلی اللہ علیہ وآلہ نے فرمایا کہ علی بن ابی طالب آپ کے بھائی، وزیر اور اہل خاندان میں جانشین ہیں۔

key_terms.دين: قرض -- مالی اور اخلاقی ذمہ داریاں

ur.seo_question: نبی کریم نے علی کو اپنا بھائی اور جانشین کیوں کہا؟

tr.summary: Hz. Peygamber (s.a.v.s.) Hz. Ali'nin kardeşi, veziri, ailesindeki halifesi ve geride bıraktıklarının en hayırlısı olduğunu beyan etmiştir.
tr.seo_question: Hz. Peygamber Hz. Ali hakkında ne buyurmuştur?

fa.summary: پیامبر اکرم (ص) فرمودند که علی بن ابی‌طالب برادر، وزیر و جانشین ایشان در میان اهل‌بیت و بهترین کسی است که پس از خود به جای می‌گذارند.

key_terms.دين: بدهی -- تعهدات مالی و اخلاقی پیامبر

fa.seo_question: پیامبر اکرم درباره علی به عنوان برادر و جانشین خود چه فرمودند؟

id.summary: Nabi Muhammad SAW menyatakan bahwa Ali bin Abi Thalib adalah saudaranya, menterinya, dan penggantinya di antara keluarganya, serta yang terbaik dari yang ditinggalkannya.

key_terms.دين: Hutang -- kewajiban finansial dan moral Nabi

id.seo_question: Apa yang Nabi Muhammad katakan tentang Ali sebagai penggantinya?

bn.summary: নবী মুহাম্মাদ (স.) ঘোষণা করেছেন যে আলী ইবনে আবি তালিব তাঁর ভাই, উজির এবং পরিবারের মধ্যে উত্তরসূরি।
bn.seo_question: নবী মুহাম্মাদ আলীকে তাঁর ভাই ও উত্তরসূরি বলে কেন ঘোষণা করেছিলেন?

es.summary: El Profeta Muhammad (P) declaró que Ali ibn Abi Talib es su hermano, ministro y sucesor en su familia.
es.seo_question: ¿Qué dijo el Profeta Muhammad sobre Ali como su hermano y sucesor?

fr.summary: Le Prophète Muhammad (P) a déclaré qu'Ali ibn Abi Talib est son frère, son ministre et son successeur dans sa famille.
fr.seo_question: Qu'a dit le Prophète Muhammad à propos d'Ali comme son frère et successeur ?

de.summary: Der Prophet Muhammad (S) erklärte, dass Ali ibn Abi Talib sein Bruder, Minister und Nachfolger in seiner Familie ist.
de.seo_question: Was sagte der Prophet Muhammad über Ali als seinen Bruder und Nachfolger?

ru.summary: Пророк Мухаммад (С) объявил, что Али ибн Аби Талиб -- его брат, помощник и преемник в его семье.
ru.seo_question: Что сказал Пророк Мухаммад об Али как о своём брате и преемнике?

zh.summary: 先知穆罕默德（愿主赐福于他和他的家属）宣告阿里·本·阿布·塔利卜是他的兄弟、大臣和家人中的继任者。

key_terms.وزير: 维齐尔（大臣）——助手和主要负责人
key_terms.دين: 债务——先知的经济和道义责任

zh.seo_question: 先知穆罕默德关于阿里作为他的兄弟和继任者说了什么？

isnad_matn.isnad_ar: قَالَ أَخْبَرَنِي أَبُو عُبَيْدِ اللَّهِ مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ عِمْرَانَ الْمَرْزُبَانِيُّ قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا أَبُو الْفَضْلِ عَبْدُ اللَّهِ بْنُ مُحَمَّدٍ الطُّوسِيُّ قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا أَبُو عَبْدِ الرَّحْمٰنِ عَبْدُ اللَّهِ بْنُ أَحْمَدَ بْنِ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ حَنْبَلٍ قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ يَحْيَى بْنِ أَبِي سَمِينَةَ قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا عُبَيْدُ اللَّهِ بْنُ مُوسَى قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا مَطَرٌ الْإِسْكَافُ قَالَ قَالَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَآلِهِ
isnad_matn.matn_ar: إِنَّ أَخِي وَوَزِيرِي وَخَلِيفَتِي فِي أَهْلِي وَخَيْرَ مَنْ أَتْرُكُ بَعْدِي يَقْضِي دَيْنِي وَيُنْجِزُ بِوَعْدِي عَلِيُّ بْنُ أَبِي طَالِبٍ

narrators.name_ar: أَبُو عُبَيْدِ اللَّهِ مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ عِمْرَانَ الْمَرْزُبَانِيُّ
narrators.name_en: Abu Ubaidullah Muhammad ibn Imran al-Marzbani
narrators.known_identity: Abu Ubaidullah Muhammad ibn Imran al-Marzbani (d. 384 AH), a prominent Baghdadi littérateur and hadith transmitter

narrators.name_ar: أَبُو الْفَضْلِ عَبْدُ اللَّهِ بْنُ مُحَمَّدٍ الطُّوسِيُّ
narrators.name_en: Abu al-Fadl Abdullah ibn Muhammad al-Tusi
narrators.ambiguity_note: Identified as Abdullah ibn Muhammad al-Tusi, a hadith transmitter from Tus

narrators.name_ar: أَبُو عَبْدِ الرَّحْمٰنِ عَبْدُ اللَّهِ بْنُ أَحْمَدَ بْنِ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ حَنْبَلٍ
narrators.name_en: Abu Abd al-Rahman Abdullah ibn Ahmad ibn Muhammad ibn Hanbal
narrators.known_identity: Abdullah ibn Ahmad ibn Hanbal (d. 290 AH), son of Imam Ahmad ibn Hanbal, hadith scholar and compiler of Musnad additions

narrators.name_ar: مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ يَحْيَى بْنِ أَبِي سَمِينَةَ
narrators.name_en: Muhammad ibn Yahya ibn Abi Saminah
narrators.known_identity: Muhammad ibn Yahya ibn Abi Saminah al-Baghdadi, a known hadith transmitter
Ubaidullah ibn Musa al-Absi al-Kufi (d. 213 AH), a reliable Kufan hadith transmitter known for his Shia sympathies

narrators.ambiguity_note: Matar al-Iskaf (the cobbler), a Kufan tabi'i narrator
narrators.known_identity: Matar al-Iskaf, a Kufan tabi'i transmitter

key_phrases.phrase_en: May God bless him and his family

similar_content_hints.description: The Hadith al-Manzilah in which the Prophet said to Ali: 'You are to me as Harun was to Musa, except there is no prophet after me' -- establishing Ali as brother and deputy.
Narrations about the Prophet designating Ali to repay his debts and fulfill his promises, as reported in Musnad Ahmad and other collections.
The Hadith of Ghadir Khumm declaring Ali as mawla (master/guardian) of the believers after the Prophet.
